forecasts.reasoning: Beto O'Rourke recently indicated a very strong likelihood of a 2026 Senate run, stating in April 2025: 'If... this is what the people of Texas want... then yes, I will.' He is currently conducting a series of 'testing the waters' town halls scheduled throughout May. Historically, Texas Democratic challengers for the Senate have announced their runs in the spring of the off-year (e.g., Allred in May, Hegar in April, O'Rourke himself in March 2017). With his current tour wrapping up in late May, a June announcement would align perfectly with historical precedents. Additionally, announcing in mid-June allows him to capitalize on the end-of-quarter FEC deadline (June 30) by leveraging urgency for initial fundraising. However, because he is a well-known figure who previously delayed a campaign start (announcing for governor in Nov 2021), and because a launch exactly on July 1 to kick off Q3 funding cannot be ruled out, the probability is kept somewhat moderate. Overall, I estimate his chances of running at around 85%, and if he runs, a ~73% chance that the announcement comes before the July 1 deadline.

Following the major escalation in early May 2025 (Operation Sindoor), India and Pakistan agreed to a ceasefire on May 11, facilitated by US intervention. Historical precedent (such as the 2019 Balakot airstrikes) suggests that after a major retaliatory strike and subsequent internationally-brokered ceasefire, another strike in "Pakistan proper" within a month or two is highly unlikely, as both sides look to de-escalate. While PM Modi warned of future strikes, this was explicitly conditional on new terrorist attacks occurring, serving as a deterrence posture rather than an indication of imminent proactive military operations. The probability of both a major terror attack occurring in June and immediately precipitating a strike within that same month is relatively low. Cross-border shelling might occur, but typically post-ceasefire periods see a lull, especially across the International Boundary (which borders Punjab and Sindh) as opposed to the Line of Control. Therefore, an attack in June 2025 is unlikely.

The probability of this event is extremely low. NUFORC receives roughly 300 to 500 reports per month globally, with the vast majority originating from the US and other Western English-speaking nations. Reports from the African continent make up a tiny fraction of the total (historically <1%). Of all civilian UFO reports, those specifically submitted by or involving pilots as witnesses are also very rare (likely under 5%). The intersection of these three conditions—a pilot report, originating from an African country, occurring in the single specific month of June 2025—represents an extremely rare conjunctive event. With no particular anticipated event driving a surge of African pilot reports in June 2025, the base rate probability of this exact combination occurring in a given month is estimated to be well below 5%. Consequently, I'm issuing a forecast of 3%.

With only 39 days remaining until the July 1, 2025 resolution date, the likelihood of an IPO announcement is extremely low. On May 9, 2025, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that Rippling has "no specific plans to go public," that an IPO is "not in the near future," and that the company must reach profitability first. Furthermore, they are relying on private liquidity events (tender offers) to satisfy employee liquidity needs, thus removing one of the main drivers for going public. Given the very recent denial, the lack of profitability, and the short remaining window, there is minimal chance of a public S-1 filing or announcement occurring before the deadline.

The military government of Mali, led by Assimi Goïta, has just issued a decree on May 13, 2025, strictly dissolving all political parties. Follow-up actions, such as scrapping the national Charter on Political Parties on May 14 and arresting opposition figures, demonstrate a firm commitment to this autocratic consolidation of power. The government has stated intentions to draft new laws to limit and regulate political parties, but structural reforms drafted by military juntas traditionally take many months, if not years, to be enacted. Furthermore, Mali's junta has recently insulated itself from international and regional pressures by withdrawing from ECOWAS and aligning structurally with Burkina Faso and Niger. Reversing such a consequential decree within just a month and a half (before July 1, 2025) is extremely unlikely under normal circumstances. Even factoring in the small risk of a counter-coup or sudden mass unrest forcing the junta's hand, the 40-day timeframe provides very little runway for such a dramatic sequence of events. Thus, the probability of any reversal, full or partial, before July 1, 2025, is assessed to be highly improbable.

With the knowledge cutoff at May 22, 2025, there are only 39 days remaining until the July 1, 2025 deadline. Databricks recently closed a massive $10B equity funding round and secured a $5.25B credit facility in early 2025. These monumental private capital raises provide ample liquidity and substitute for an immediate IPO. Typically, an S-1 filing or IPO announcement is preceded by months of leaks regarding the selection of lead banks, yet there has been no such news here. Coupled with an April late-April report stating "no public plans to host an IPO," the likelihood of a sudden announcement in the short remaining window is extremely low.

There is no evidence in the search results that either Donald Trump or Elon Musk used the exact phrase "diversity visa" on X prior to the knowledge cutoff of May 22, 2025. The public debate has heavily focused on "H-1B visas" and legal vs. illegal immigration rather than the diversity visa lottery. Given the specific phrasing required for a positive resolution and the limited time left (if the July 1 deadline applies, or the fact that it already passed if the April 1 title deadline applies), the likelihood of this occurring or having occurred without being captured in recent news about their visa debates is very low.
